faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about GoodTrans.

items.question: What is GoodTrans?
items.answer: GoodTrans is an AI-powered translation service using 5-round reflection technology. Unlike simple machine translation, we iterate multiple times to ensure quality close to human translation.

items.question: What file formats do you support?
items.answer: We support PDF, Word (.docx), Markdown (.md), and plain text (.txt). More formats coming soon.

items.question: How long does translation take?
items.answer: 100K words take about 1 hour. You'll receive an email notification when your translation is ready.

items.question: What is 5-round reflection translation?
items.answer: Round 1: Extract text from PDF. Round 2: Optimize formatting. Round 3: Initial translation. Round 4: AI reflects and finds issues. Round 5: Apply improvements and finalize. This ensures much higher quality than one-shot translation.

items.question: How accurate is terminology consistency?
items.answer: Our 3-layer terminology system (user glossary + official database + AI extraction) achieves 95%+ consistency. We're still testing and will update the exact number after 100 documents.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept Stripe (credit cards) and Creem (Alipay/WeChat Pay for Chinese users).

items.question: Do you offer refunds?
items.answer: If you're not satisfied with the translation quality, contact us within 24 hours and we'll work with you to improve it or issue a refund.

faq.tip: Still have questions? Contact us
